claim_text: Controlled defect corpus: each mutation's hidden test passes on the clean module and fails on the mutated one (deterministic, LLM-free oracle).
Heterogeneous review does not dominate all baselines on average; gains concentrate by defect type.
At matched budget (2 calls), cross-family review does NOT beat giving the same author equal extra compute.
statistical_support: no differentiation: no_review=author_more=cross_review=0.80; underpowered by an all-ceiling corpus (8/10 one-shot; 2 were benchmark bugs, fixed)
limitations: corpus too easy -> needs mid-difficulty fairly-specified defects for the full study

claim_text: A defect-type author x reviewer complementarity interaction survives controlling for reviewer strength.
A pre-call router improves the held-out-repository cost-correctness frontier vs the strongest fixed policy.
limitations: router validated on simulated data only so far
